---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: blog-list
    contents: "posts/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-hero">
  <div class="content-section" style="padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0;">
    <p class="eyebrow">Writing</p>
    <h1 style="font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Blog</h1>
    <p style="color:#4A6A88;font-size:0.9rem;max-width:480px;line-height:1.6;">
      Policy analysis, data methods, and field notes — thinking out loud 
      at the intersection of evidence and practice.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {#blog-list}
:::
